title: Emoji and Reactions
drDigitalIntro:
Emoji are small pictures that show feelings.
• Instead of typing "haha", send a laughing emoji.
• There are thousands to choose from.
• You can react to a message by double-clicking (or pressing and holding) it — a row of emoji appears and you pick one.
• Reactions are a quick way to say "I saw this" or show how you feel without typing.

playgroundTask.goal: You reacted to a message with an emoji

steps.say: Click on Sam to open their conversation.
Double-click (or press and hold) Sam's message to react with an emoji.

drDigitalSuccess: A quick emoji reaction — no typing needed. A great way to say 'I saw this' or show how you feel.
drDigitalHint: Click Sam, then double-click their message bubble (or press and hold it). Pick any emoji from the row that appears.
